education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed AI-native multi-channel B2B order agent leveraging Claude Sonnet and RAG for intelligent automation across webhooks, WhatsApp, email, and phone; deployed machine learning solution processing 1,000+ orders for 7 enterprise clients

Implemented AI model validation layer with automated output-verification and human-in-the-loop QA to detect LLM failure modes; optimized prompts and integrated vector-store correction memory, improving precision across 1,000+ production orders

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Developed automated machine learning platform for sleep-stage classification achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy using Scikit-Learn models validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms
Built asynchronous data processing pipeline with Redis + ARQ for distributed EEG parsing, spectral feature extraction, and per-patient machine learning classifier training on Sleep-EDF dataset
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard for real-time AI model output visualization, rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for quality assurance review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)

Integrated multi-service AI system with HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 API, and SendGrid escalation; deployed dual-model Claude architecture (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Deployed production machine learning solution auto-booking qualified leads and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach through intelligent automation and data processing
